subcodes.first_line: O ye two brothers! That sanctified spirit, that pure soul, hath ascended unto the celestial realms, finding release from this world of dust [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر آن روح مجرد آن جان پاک رو بافلاک کرد و از جهان خاک رها یافت و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
